evals.prompt: Extract all the text from this PDF file: C:\Users\ypyl\OneDrive\Documents\Yauhen_Pyl_CV_0.pdf. Save the extracted text to a file called cv_text.txt in the current directory. Make sure to preserve the layout and formatting.
evals.expected_output: A text file (cv_text.txt) containing all the text content from the CV PDF, with preserved formatting

evals.prompt: Get the metadata and document information from this PDF: C:\Users\ypyl\OneDrive\Documents\Yauhen_Pyl_CV_0.pdf. Show me the page count, author, creation date, and any other available metadata.
evals.expected_output: Display of PDF metadata including page count, title, author, creation date, PDF version, and page size

evals.prompt: Extract any embedded images from this PDF file: C:\Users\ypyl\OneDrive\Documents\Yauhen_Pyl_CV_0.pdf. Save them as PNG files in a folder called 'extracted_images'.
evals.expected_output: PNG image files in the extracted_images folder, extracted from the PDF (may be empty if no embedded images exist)
